name: x-browser-automation-playbook
description: Use this skill for interactive work on X.com — posting, searching/collecting, opening bookmarks/notifications/profile/Grok, liking/bookmarking focused posts, replying, Grok-via-X OAuth flows, and other live browser actions. Prefer the verified X composite tools first when they fit. For plain X status URLs that the user wants fetched/read, start with web_fetch for one URL or web_fetch_batch for several URLs and answer from that unless more interaction is requested.
triggers: log in to grok via x

defaultWorkflow: For explicit X posting/search/open-page/focused-like/focused-bookmark requests, use the verified x_* composite tools first when available.
For Grok login or Grok file-upload work, prefer X/Grok OAuth routing when anonymous grok.com blocks the task, then continue from the existing Grok-via-X example.
For plain X post/thread URL reading, use web_fetch first for one URL and web_fetch_batch first for several URLs.
Fallback to manual visual-first browser automation only when the composite does not fit or fails.
